name: Cloudian - Turbulence
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>雲魔物</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>クラウディアン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－タービュランス
desc: Cannot be destroyed by battle. If this card is in face-up Defense Position, destroy it. If this card is Normal Summoned: Place 1 Fog Counter on it for each "Cloudian" monster on the field. You can remove 1 Fog Counter from this card; Special Summon 1 "Cloudian - Smoke Ball" from your Deck or either GY.
mnst_eff: Cannot be destroyed by battle. If this card is in face-up Defense Position, destroy it. If this card is Normal Summoned: Place 1 Fog Counter on it for each "Cloudian" monster on the field. You can remove 1 Fog Counter from this card; Special Summon 1 "Cloudian - Smoke Ball" from your Deck or either GY.
eff: Cannot be destroyed by battle. If this card is in face-up Defense Position, destroy it. If this card is Normal Summoned: Place 1 Fog Counter on it for each "Cloudian" monster on the field. You can remove 1 Fog Counter from this card; Special Summon 1 "Cloudian - Smoke Ball" from your Deck or either GY.

sets.set: Speed Duel GX: Duelists of Shadows

counter: Removes counters from itself for cost
summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
